[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A vertically oriented blue game-style interface shows a central panel with Japanese text at the top and a highlighted “プレイ” (play) button near the bottom.

Main Subject:
The image centers on a tall, badge-like UI panel with glowing blue side highlights, containing a smaller screen-like window near the upper middle, a golden-blue emblem with the word “senkou” below it, and a stylized fiery emblem in the lower middle. At the bottom, a long gold banner button with Japanese text “プレイ” is prominently displayed.

Setting:
This is an indoor, digital graphic interface with no real-world environment visible. The lighting is fully stylized, with neon-like blue glow lines and brighter golden highlights used to draw attention to the center and bottom controls.

Visual Details:
The background is deep blue with symmetrical vertical shapes and curved corner accents. Thin light-blue outlines trace the central structure, while two bright neon-blue vertical lines run down the left and right sides of the main central panel. In the upper section, there is a rectangular, dark-blue inset with a screenshot-like layout and a small timer-like display, though the exact UI contents inside are not fully legible. Below that, a purple ribbon-like banner contains the white text “senkou” with a star-shaped icon to the left. Under the ribbon, there is a gold and purple crest resembling a sharp, winged or armored face with glowing light effects. Centered lower on the panel is the Japanese text “トフライシ” (exact characters visible). Near the bottom, the gold button banner has a beveled, gem-like appearance with white Japanese text “プレイ.” On the bottom right, there is a circular badge with a dark blue center and a “NEW” label at the top; inside is a small plus sign area and additional markings that are unclear. The camera angle is straight-on, with a centered composition and no visible people or physical objects.

Visible Text:
ランキングドラフト
3ンス
senkou
トフライシ
プレイ
NEW

Practical Summary:
The image is a blue, game-like user interface screen with a central promotional panel and a gold “プレイ” button. It also includes multiple lines of Japanese text and a “NEW” badge in the lower right.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
